svg.title: What 15 minutes a day becomes over time
svg.desc: What 15 minutes a day becomes over time. Source: 15 min/day × 7 days/week calculation. Simple linear projection. 91 hours over a year — enough to learn a new skill, build a prototype, or write a dozen essays.

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #2563eb; stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: square
fill: none; stroke: #000000; stroke-width: 0.8; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square
